name: studio-dynamic-local-models-and-openrouter-crash
title: Skill Studio: real local model list + OpenRouter hover-crash fix
summary: Skill Studio model picker fixes: (1) the Ollama list is now dynamic (probeOllama -> GET /api/tags) with no hardcoded fallback — an offline runtime yields an empty list + the start-service CTA instead of four fake Llama-family models; (2) OpenRouter hover no longer crashes — hydrateOpenRouter guards a malformed catalog, rankFiltered is null-safe, and useMemo/useVirtualList were hoisted above the empty-card early return to fix the React #300 hook-order crash. Probe timeout raised 500ms->2000ms for cold-sidecar starts.
